title: Implement sync completion detection before emitting files

contextToReadFirst.reason: Sync detection method confirmed during the spike. Adapt if spike identified a better method than file-size-stability polling.
Current implementation from Task 002.2 — replace the direct onFileDetected call with sync check

changes: Create `SyncCompletionChecker` with method `waitForSyncCompletion(file: URL, pollInterval: TimeInterval = 1.0, stableReadings: Int = 3, timeout: TimeInterval = 300) async throws -> Bool`

Implementation: poll the file size every `pollInterval` seconds. When the file size is unchanged for `stableReadings` consecutive checks, return true. If `timeout` is reached, throw `SyncError.timeout(path:duration:)`
In FSEventsWatcher, replace the direct `onFileDetected` call from Task 002.2 with: detect .m4a → call `SyncCompletionChecker.waitForSyncCompletion` → on success, call `onFileDetected`
While waiting for sync completion, the watcher should still detect other new files — don't block the FSEvents stream. Use a `Task {}` to handle each file's sync wait concurrently.

tests.name: test_waitsForFileToStabilize
tests.description: Create a temp file, append data to it every 0.5 seconds for 3 seconds then stop. Assert waitForSyncCompletion returns true only after the file stops growing (not before).

tests.name: test_returnsImmediatelyForStableFile
tests.description: Create a temp file, don't modify it. Assert waitForSyncCompletion returns true within pollInterval * stableReadings seconds.

tests.name: test_timeoutWhenFileNeverStabilizes
tests.description: Create a temp file, continuously append data. Call with timeout: 3.0. Assert it throws SyncError.timeout.

doneWhen: The watcher holds back files that are still growing and only emits them once stable. Timeout behavior is tested. Integration with the watcher from Task 002.2 is verified.
doNot: Hardcode the poll interval or stability threshold — make them configurable via init parameters
Block the FSEvents callback while waiting for sync — each file's sync wait must be independent
